item.title: My heart! After a 16yr old soccer player was shot in Mexico by a cop who wrongly thought he was a criminal his friends had him score one more goal at his funeral!! Heartbreaking and heartwarming at the same time
item.description: His name was Alexander Madtínez An old story, but I hadn't seen this video before and really thought it was worth sharing! He clearly had great friends and was a great kid!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Oh no!
item.description: EDIT: Wow, that was fast! Thanks for the upvotes, Imgurians! Always remember to check the quality of your copper! I do some reviews as a hobby, if you wanna check them, feel free to visit https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ Ahem... "Somehow Ea-nāṣir Returned"
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Cake Day Dump from my DnD inspirarion folder
item.description:
The folder I pulled this from is for like visual writing prompts for dnd campaigns I make.
I'm not putting links or sources out of laziness, but I do feel slightly guilty about that.
This is for standard fantasy, if I can find time later I might post a modern/future and dump.
item.dc:creator: DavianPrime

item.title: Brits always take it up a notch…
item.dc:creator: voidmain

item.title: Memes are my Love Language: A Distraction Dump for Those Who Need it Today
item.description:
You're telling me FIVE different guys made this burger??
But then peasants might interact with me
This all checks out
Give it a shot, I probably won't but y'all should
Excuse me where's the 'wishlist' button, hello
Anti-theft strategy
Choose your fighter
Well they used the 'step' prefix like one time so it's all good I guess
WAS IT ME BARRY, I GENUINELY CAN'T REMEMBER
Editorial: Are Poors 'People'?
See, this is how PornHub uses 'step', shoulda put those two back to back FUCK
You really do start seeing it everywhere
Whoops how did a serious one get in, whoops I'm feelings emotions now, whoops
Fallout 4 was right I guess
Can we start a meme retirement home? There are some we definitely need to take out of rotation
Well I just thought of a new fifth reason you didn't cover, CHECKMATE
Shit now I have to make a whole new BBEG
I'm disrupting math
I am not responsible for the level of engagement you seem to require of me, thanks tho
Still a better love story oh dang it them hats fooled me again
In my experience, a lot of men need to think they're the only one who thinks a woman is attractive in order to feel secure. See 'girl next door', see 'slowly remove her glasses and brush her hair back'
I don't even remember drinking it but the glass is definitely empty
I wrote a poem to help me remember my password, I keep it on the other side of the building
The real question is, what kind of shadows does all this cast on the cave wall
WHO TOLD
The good news is, it's never too late to apologize to yourself
If this is real I'd like to kindly request a link in the comments
POV: My current Halfling Ranger
They won't teach you this in those PUA seminars
It really is
Just give me super armour. I'll take the damage just DO NOT interrupt my attack
I rarely agree with him but when he's right he's right
She took her own route but she got there in the end
His wasn't supposed to be a BG3 dump but yeah, I can't do it
Just get a bigger arm
Turns out science didn't end 50 years ago, they're still making new episodes
Be pretty cool if it was tho
Bad comparison because she's actually kinda right
That cloud has his Undivided attention
Talking to me like this will have a 100% success rate
My new Netflix special
Teach Boomers that they aren't shareholders with a vote in your reproductive decisions
A good cover reminds you of the original. A great cover replaces it.
Skeketor single-handedly created the now universally accepted Skeleton Accent
And you can too
See every Gen Xer on Facebook
Have you told a brand 'silence' lately?
Friend I BEEN asking
I thought I couldn't adore her anymore when she said this, I didn't know how high that tree could grow
Which tune would be funnier? Most Viral Edit: Glad to have helped provide some distractions, thought my kindred spirits out there might need it today. All this feedback has definitely gone to my head, gonna go build some wings and punch the sun in the face.
item.dc:creator: coolbrood

item.title: OMG IT'S VALENTINE'S DAY?!! (+ bonus panel!)
item.description:
Keep scrolling for a bonus panel!
Happy valentines, imgur! I'm working on a new valentines comic but it won't be ready til later this week (see my (slow) progress on twitch). Oh and https://patreon.com/LoadingArtist if you'd like more bonus panels/comics!
item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: The calls are coming from inside the house
item.description: The meme really does say it all, in my opinion. Based on a B&W photo I saw.
item.dc:creator: AnotherDiscordianAtLarge

item.title: Non-scale victory
item.description: I am in treatment for disordered eating. The photo on the left was taken on January 22nd of last month, versus the photo today on the right. I looked down at my legs, and noticed they don’t look as bruised anymore. Non scale victory :) Edit: if anyone is unaware, disordered eating, especially restrictive disordered eating, can create unbalanced and nutrient deficient dietary habits that can contribute to a multitude of health issues, some of which express themselves externally.
item.dc:creator: personalrandomgirlaccount

item.title: Using a laser to create stone carvings
item.dc:creator: MabooCraboo

item.title: Cute & cute guitar
item.description: Just trying to help you smile or crack a mental smirk today, even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!
item.dc:creator: epicurusaquinas

item.title: Images of Note: Majestical creature.
item.description:
has also forgotten where they were
yesterday was pancake day, the best day of the year
a creechur
girl on the left has tom of finland energy
I almost bought a portable Analogue TV for this specific purpose, but to make a fake retro computer using an rPi.
Don't forget, with this being the 50s, the Dad is likely traumatized by war and not able to get help!
born of chaos that's possibly committing crimes is a vibe
WELP
oh look, it's the good ending. ;_;
That's...jesus
Amazing
Lesbian witch wives ;-;
Does the Scythe have a wider radius?
It's because those people also have money invested in office real estate.
That's it, that's basically Star Trek Enterprise.
Furgonomics is actually something very interesting to think about, how would headphones work?
I had to see this and now you do too.
THE HAND
OuO
owo
outrageous.
SOUND ON YOU COWARDS
This is how I would imagine Plato, the Philosopher, would be in the 90s. Plato was not his real name, but his nickname because he was a wrestler. Plato means Broad!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
Also, I would just like to dedicate this post to Tufty, who crossed the Rainbow Bridge today. Go hug your cats, people.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Don’t forget to recline
item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: Friend's Doodle, figured ya'll would love it
item.description: It's one of his many OC's dancing, gal and cat from his webtoons series. Someone tell me how to steal images off of webtoons and I'll give you a 4th wall breaking cat comic, cause he probably doesn't have said comics on his computer anymore, and webtoons doesn't want me downloading it. https://www.instagram.com/p/C3PfDjQrFyK/ https://twitter.com/souldroids/status/1756943894900519139
item.dc:creator: BritishMexicanMurican

item.title: Momo definitely knew 1000% what he was doing! :)
item.dc:creator: Rammsteinstochter

item.title: My attempt at cosplaying Misato from Evangelion - YuzuPyon
item.description: Hello everyone I hope you enjoy the cosplay pics! I transformed into Misato Live on Youtube, showing all steps of Cosplay transformation from wig styling to makeup, if you're interested to learn more about the process here is the VOD : https://www.youtube.com/live/ziMdMNi8PqE If you have any question about cosplay let me know in the comments, please. I'd love to make a video answering common questions about cosplay :) I wish you all a great day, let me know which Cosplay I should do next :D - Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1110 (etruscan fratboy)
item.description:
It's Arizona Statehood Day. Or I guess normal people consider it Valentine's Day, but whatever. The point is, I'm awake, and ready to bring vengeance for that fact. Let's get this bread.
Seems like a baaaaaaad idea.
The Cretaceous Wu-Tang clan
Damn, so much for my plans.
I'm definitely Cruel and Unusual Geography. Or maybe Esoteric Studies. @sisipherr is totally Extreme Horticulture.
Love these memes.
Oviraptorids of Hell Creek.
They're roommates now.
In some fundamental ways, humans have never changed
Get in, we're wrapping presents.
Cursed vestments
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "What the hell? Okay. Pippin."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Large Evening Dump
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: The good news I needed to hear today!!
item.description: The vets told me yesterday they needed to get him to the dspca as quickly as possible because the owner's they think probably owned him would come looking and cause a lot of trouble. Travelers use lurchers and Whippets for illegal rabbit hunting and really don't give a shit about their dogs. Turns out the DSPCA wouldn't have been able to collect him for a couple of days, but the vet knew this woman who has fostered and adopted before so rang her and she took him as soon as she saw him!! I really needed to hear good, happy news today! Edit, photo the girls in the shop took of the poor pup didn't load, so glad he got to stay in a warm home last night and will finally be looked after properly! https://imgur.com/a/lkho3ta
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.dc:creator: Garraty2446

item.title: Silver lining...
item.description: I have been absolutely dreading the upcoming election season. American politics is a fucking shit show, embarrassing (as a US citizen), and profoundly depressing. But learning that Jon Stewart is back hosting the Daily Show through the election rates as some of the best TV news that I've heard in years. Now... let's work on reviving Firefly.
item.dc:creator: loudloutishlover

item.title: Random night dump
item.dc:creator: justasimpleinternetfarmer

item.title: Red Flags for VDay - Cosplay
item.description:
This felt appropriate for Valentine's Day - My Cosplay of the woman from Tom Cardy's "Red Flags" music video. One of my favorite cosplays in a while, very simple look ultimately, but it was so fun to get into character. Happy VDay everybody!!! Get the vid stuck in your head the rest of the day here: https://youtube.com/watch?v=GFokXnCCMf8
Reference Image!
Not scary at all...
Reference Image!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: It's Wenidsday my dudettes!
item.description: Artist: C_Nesens Had several ideas for Valentine's Day because I love the Wenclair ship, but this one seemed the most thematic.
item.dc:creator: MermaidNinja

item.title: Today I learned.......
item.description:
The young couple Bill Murray helps out? Well that young man is......
....none other than General Zod himself, Michael Shannon! Groundhog Day was the first movie he ever appeared in.
item.dc:creator: idrinkcheapbeer

item.title: "If I Were Human, I Believe My Response Would Be 'Go To Hell'... If I Were Human."
item.description: Thought I'd post something funny for my fellow Imgurians on this peaceful Tuesday evening.
